message:
Add privacy-respecting Plausible analytics

Implements optional Plausible analytics integration:
- Configurable via NEXT_PUBLIC_PLAUSIBLE_DOMAIN env var
- Respects browser Do Not Track (DNT) setting
- Uses data-respect-dnt attribute on script tag

Analytics library (apps/web/src/lib/analytics.ts):
- trackEvent() function for custom events
- Event types: prompt_view, prompt_copy, search, export, skill_install
- Sanitizes props, checks DNT before sending

Tracked events:
- Homepage: search queries (debounced 300ms)
- Prompt views in detail modal
- Prompt copies from SpotlightSearch
- Export/install actions

All tracking is:
- Privacy-first (no cookies, no personal data)
- Opt-out by default (requires env var to enable)
- DNT-compliant (respects browser preference)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
